title: markea pavonii
intro: Markea pavonii, also known as the 'Shaggy Solanum' or 'Pavon's Markea', is a flowering plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant contains solanine, a compound known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues. Markea pavonii has been traditionally used to treat fever, inflammation, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may also help lower blood pressure and prevent cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts for its health benefits, although its effectiveness and safety should be further researched.
